rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or removing invalid clauses
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use AGREE scalar type names: int, real, and bool
generic_rules: Trace the first unresolved identifier or invalid helper declaration on the same line
Remove invalid clauses instead of adding architecture when references are unresolved
Use comparison expressions for bool, integer literals and arithmetic for int, and real literals and arithmetic for real
Ensure all named things have valid types and expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in a component type annex
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
Do not use subcomponent ports in a component type contract unless represented through valid variables or outputs
